reasoning: On October 26, 2025, Wikipedia will display Fabiano Caruana's official October 1 FIDE rating of 2789. A 1% increase equates to 27.89 points, meaning his official rating must reach at least 2817 on the resolution dates to resolve YES. Wikipedia's FIDE rankings page only updates monthly with the official lists. For the November 2 and November 25 resolution dates, the page will display his November 1 rating. During October 2025, Caruana played in the US Chess Championship. Since he was playing against a significantly lower-rated field and admitted his form was shaky (lamenting poor decisions during the tournament), it is mathematically near-impossible for him to have gained the ~28 Elo points needed from that event to hit 2817 for the November rating list. For the January 24, 2026 date, the Wikipedia page will reflect his January 1, 2026 official FIDE rating. While his rating could increase, producing a +28 point jump (+2817) in just two months would require repeated 2900+ tournament performances. While technically possible, this remains highly improbable. Therefore, probabilities are kept extremely low, increasing slightly over time to account for a longer forecast horizon.
